description: A painting of a dramatic sunset behind a railroad signal tower. The small, dark silhouette of the tower and a signal pole stand against a vibrant sky that transitions from deep blue at the top through yellow to fiery red-orange at the horizon. Railroad tracks run along the bottom of the composition. The landscape is flat and expansive, emphasizing the vastness of the American countryside and the isolation of the setting. The painting captures a moment of luminous beauty tinged with solitude, characteristic of Edward Hopper's work.
